subject: how-to-use-the-mcp
body:
Hello CD(RSn),

This draft wire explains how to use the new Wild West MCP tools.

Use `wildwest_draft_wire` to create a wire draft in local workspace `.wildwest/telegraph/flat/` and review it before sending.
Use `wildwest_send_wire` to immediately dispatch a wire to territory and also copy it to the local `.wildwest/telegraph/outbox/` for delivery.

Available MCP tools now are: `wildwest_status`, `wildwest_inbox`, `wildwest_board`, `wildwest_telegraph_check`, `wildwest_draft_wire`, and `wildwest_send_wire`.

Do not supply a custom `from` value in MCP calls; the sender is derived from the local registry alias.

This new MCP flow lets Claude or other tool clients create wires without opening the UI.

Regards,
TM(wildwest-vscode)
